source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT TOP 1000
  H.ORNO [OrderNumber]
, H.ORTP [OrderType]
, H.WHLO [Warehouse]
, CASE H.ORST
    WHEN '05' THEN '05 | Quote'
    WHEN '20' THEN '20 | Registered'
    WHEN '22' THEN '22 | Reserved'
    WHEN '23' THEN '23 | Reserved / Allocated'
    WHEN '24' THEN '24 | Reserved / Picking'
    WHEN '26' THEN '26 | Reserved / Delivered'
    WHEN '27' THEN '27 | Reserved / Invoiced'
    WHEN '33' THEN '33 | Allocated'
    WHEN '37' THEN '37 | Allocated / Invoiced'
    WHEN '44' THEN '44 | Picking'
    WHEN '46' THEN '46 | Picking / Delivered'
    WHEN '47' THEN '47 | Picking / Invoiced'
    WHEN '66' THEN '66 | Delivered'
    WHEN '67' THEN '67 | Delivered / Invoiced'
    WHEN '77' THEN '77 | Invoiced'
    WHEN '79' THEN '79 | Invoices / Deleted'
    WHEN '90' THEN '90 | Deleted'
    WHEN '99' THEN '99 | Deleted'
    END [OrderStatus]
, H.CUNO + ' | ' + O.CUNM [CustomerNameFull]
, H.ORDT [OrderDate]
FROM M3.OOHEAD H LEFT JOIN M3.OCUSMA O ON H.CUNO=O.CUNO
WHERE H.DIVI='TLC' AND ORDT>'8/1/2024'
